sections.name: Electronics
sections.experimental_note: The electronics are early and changing a lot. Only build these if you have the experience to adapt as the design moves.

assemblies.name: Light post
assemblies.description: The feeder light post: post, cap, and cap adapter. 2 per machine.

assemblies.name: External distribution-frame bracket
assemblies.description: Three parts that bolt together into one external bracket. 6 per distribution frame (per layer), plus a set per interface.

assemblies.name: Fixed upper section
assemblies.description: The interface's fixed upper section: the upper-fixed-section plate, its ribs (5 plain + 1 with the limit-switch gap), and the big spacer. 1 per interface.

assemblies.name: Cable clamp
assemblies.description: Inner + outer ribbon cable clamp; the two halves go together. White.

assemblies.name: Classification chamber
assemblies.description: The classification chamber: dome, cap, and finned rotor (lighting parts white).

assemblies.name: Chute bearing assembly
assemblies.description: Left + right bearing holders and the race between them.

assemblies.name: Servo adapter (MG995)
assemblies.description: MG995 servo adapter: servo side + flap side.

assemblies.name: Servo bracket (MG995)
assemblies.description: MG995 servo bracket: lower arm, side arm, cover, housing.

assemblies.name: Overhead camera mount
assemblies.description: Camera mount for the C-channels. 2 per machine (each: parts 6/37/37b + 2× rod-to-C-channel mount).

assemblies.name: Layer connector
assemblies.description: Pair of connectors. 1 of each per layer + 1 of each per bottom interface.

assemblies.name: Limit switch
assemblies.description: Interface limit switch: printed dowel pin, housing, and hammer.

assemblies.name: Cable cage
assemblies.description: Two cable cage brackets and the outer ribbon cable clamp.

assemblies.name: Meanwell 24V PSU box
assemblies.description: Enclosure for the Meanwell 24V power supply: back mount, connections plate, and cap.

assemblies.name: Camera extension
assemblies.description: Classification-channel camera extension for the Innomaker 4K camera module: the 50 mm extension tube and its mount. 1 per machine.

parts.name: Stator
parts.description: Feeder stator. 4 required: 1 gray + 3 black.

parts.name: Rotor (faceted)
parts.description: Faceted rotor. 3 required: 2 white + 1 gray.

parts.name: Output gear (130T)
parts.description: Output gear, 130 teeth. One per C-channel (4 total).

parts.name: NEMA bracket
parts.description: NEMA motor bracket. One per C-channel (4 total).

parts.name: Light post
parts.description: Light post on the C-channel feeder. 2 total.

parts.name: Light post cap
parts.description: Light post cap. 2 total (C-channels 2 & 3). White.

parts.name: Light post cap adapter
parts.description: Adapts the light post cap to the C-channel. 2 per machine.

parts.name: Bulk cap
parts.description: Bulk cap. Sits on top of the first C-channel.

parts.name: Classification dome
parts.description: Large classification-channel dome (~full bed). White.

parts.name: Interface bracket
parts.description: Interface bracket. Pairs with the spacer; 6 on the interface.
parts.suspicious_note: The fit onto the interface spoke (long) is too tight — there's no clearance.

parts.name: Interface spacer
parts.description: Interface spacer. Pairs with the bracket; 6 on the interface.

parts.name: Chute core
parts.description: The chute core. 1 per machine.

parts.name: Bin retainer (left)
parts.description: Bin retainer, left. Optional.

parts.name: Bin retainer (right)
parts.description: Bin retainer, right. Optional.

parts.name: Frame crossbeam
parts.description: Distribution frame crossbeam. One between each of the 6 frame sections.

parts.name: Frame 90° bracket
parts.description: Distribution frame 90° bracket. Two per frame section.

parts.name: Lazy Susan — chute mount
parts.description: Bottom lazy Susan adapter that connects to the chute. White.

parts.name: Lazy Susan — bottom static
parts.description: Bottom lazy Susan static base.

parts.name: Lazy Susan — extrusion mount
parts.description: Bottom lazy Susan mount to the external extrusion.

parts.name: Lazy Susan — hold in place
parts.description: Bottom lazy Susan hold-in-place. Optional.

parts.name: Lazy Susan — washer
parts.description: Bottom lazy Susan washer.

parts.name: External bracket — side
parts.description: Part of the external distribution-frame bracket (3-part assembly).
parts.low_tolerance_note: A test print is suggested. This part is a tight fit around the 2020 aluminum profile, so print one first and confirm it seats properly before committing to the full set — dial in your printer and profile together.

parts.name: External bracket — bottom vertical
parts.description: Part of the external distribution-frame bracket (3-part assembly).

parts.name: External bracket — cover
parts.description: Part of the external distribution-frame bracket (3-part assembly).

parts.name: External bracket - foot cover
parts.description: Bottom-layer replacement for the external bracket bottom vertical + cover.
parts.info: For the bottom-most layer only. It is shorter than the standard bottom vertical + cover so the extrusion can pop out and the wheels mount to it.

parts.name: Interface upper fixed section
parts.description: Interface upper fixed section. 1 needed.

versions.message: Reshaped: now 35 mm tall (was 33 mm), with rib attachments.

parts.suspicious_note: The lazy-Susan holes are slightly too close together. We intend to make them M5-compatible; they're currently M4.

parts.description: Ribbed interface piece. 5 needed.

parts.description: Interface rib with the opening for the limit switch. 1 needed.

parts.description: Interface big spacer. 1 needed.

parts.description: Inner half of the ribbon cable clamp. White.

parts.description: Outer half of the ribbon cable clamp. White.
parts.suspicious_note: The M3 nut does not fit into the hole.
